hooks.prompt: Inspect the bash tool input in $ARGUMENTS. If the command contains 'git commit', update CLAUDE.md at the project root: (1) refresh the '### Source layout' code block to match the actual current src/ directory tree, (2) rewrite the '### Current state' bullet points to reflect what was just committed — use 'git log --oneline -3' to understand recent changes. Keep every other section of CLAUDE.md exactly as-is. If the command was not a git commit, do nothing.
